# .obstral.md — Runtime eval fixture

## Stack
Rust

## Test Command
test_cmd: cargo test -q observer::repo_rules::tests:: 2>&1 && bash scripts/tui-replay-smoke.sh

## Development Rules
- Read the target file before editing it
- Make the smallest safe code change that fixes the failing test
- If replay-sensitive observer rules change, update `docs/runtime-architecture.md` and `.obstral/tui_replay.json` in the same change
- Run `bash scripts/tui-replay-smoke.sh` before calling done
